evals.name: bailout-after-three-hypotheses
evals.prompt: Continue specs/004-pagination-boundary/checklist.md from the saved debug worktree. Resolve the pagination defect if the workflow permits, and otherwise finish the required handback.
evals.expected_output: The existing three failed hypotheses exhaust BAILOUT_N=3. No fourth hypothesis or production fix is attempted; speculative edits are absent; the checklist is committed awaiting-human with a complete evidence/findings handback.
files: fixture: integration repo with registered debug worktree, genuine failing repro, committed checklist containing three distinct executed/disproved hypotheses, and unchanged buggy production source
assertions: Existing checklist, debug/004-pagination-boundary branch, worktree, reproduction evidence, and three attempt entries are reused without replacement or rewriting
The workflow recognizes BAILOUT_N=3 is exhausted and does not attempt a fourth hypothesis, production edit, or merge
Failed speculative production changes are absent and the original reproduction remains observable
Checklist status is awaiting-human and unresolved fix, verification, persistence-as-fixed, and merge steps remain unchecked
Handback distinguishes supported facts from inference and preserves all three hypotheses, predictions, experiments, and observed results
Handback names remaining hypotheses/evidence needed, risks/untouched areas, and exactly one recommended next experiment or human decision; any diagnostic evidence commit is scanned and verified

evals.name: fresh-successful-diagnosis
evals.prompt: The documented parsePort contract accepts integer ports from 0 through 65535, but parsePort("0") throws. Reproduce and diagnose the defect, add a regression test, implement the smallest verified fix, and integrate it into the non-protected develop branch.
evals.expected_output: The defect is reproduced before production edits in a fresh debug worktree, evidence is gathered and ranked, the causal fix preserves the regression oracle, targeted/full tests pass, scanned commits are verified, and a tested non-fast-forward merge plus truthful record reaches develop.
files: fixture: repo on develop with documented parsePort range, buggy falsy check, passing nonzero regression, no debug artifacts/worktree, and no dependencies
assertions: All mutable work occurs in a newly allocated .worktrees/NNN-slug on the matching debug/NNN-slug branch based on the recorded develop head, never directly in the destination checkout
A requirement-mapped zero-port regression test is observed failing for the reported reason before production code changes
A neutral explorer delegation brief, structured independent return, orchestrator citation validation, and a ranked causal hypothesis with a discriminating prediction are persisted before the fix
The smallest causal implementation leaves tests intact and the original repro, targeted boundary tests, and full regression suite are independently observed green
Staged added-lines credential scans precede verified code, checklist-truth, merge, and record commits, and the checklist cites actual hashes

Non-protected develop contains a tested non-fast-forward feature merge and truthful merge record, is clean, main remains unchanged, and worktree/branch cleanup or intentional retention is reported from observed Git state
